ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lum1104/Understand-Anything
Language: typescript
Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: typescript
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
Language: typescript
OpenStock is an open-source alternative to expensive market platforms. Track real-time prices, set personalized alerts, and explore detailed company insights — built openly, for everyone, forever free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
Language: typescript
omo; the best agent harness - previously oh-my-opencode

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cursor/plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cursor/plugins
Language: typescript
Cursor plugin specification and official plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: earendil-works/pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/earendil-works/pi
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: garrytan/gstack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
Language: typescript
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langfuse/langfuse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langfuse/langfuse
Language: typescript
🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: marktext/marktext
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/marktext/marktext
Language: typescript
📝A simple and elegant markdown editor, available for Linux, macOS and Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/playwright-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/playwright-cli
Language: typescript
CLI for common Playwright actions. Record and generate Playwright code, inspect selectors and take screenshots.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moeru-ai/airi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi
Language: typescript
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: orval-labs/orval
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/orval-labs/orval
Language: typescript
orval is able to generate client with appropriate type-signatures (TypeScript) from any valid OpenAPI v3 or Swagger v2 specification, either in yaml or json formats. 🍺

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: typescript
Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

ns0:entry.ns0:title: twentyhq/twenty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/twentyhq/twenty
Language: typescript
The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.
